title: tolumnia calochila
intro: Tolumnia calochila, also known as the calochila toadface, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Tolumnia and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Tolumnia calochila include its ability to be used as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, cuts, and skin infections. The health benefits of Tolumnia calochila include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Tolumnia calochila is commonly prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
